repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: The current ca6k_00286 build fails with errors on StorageShape (no GetDimNum/GetDim) and tiling data direct assignment (members not public). Memory 5014fe8c (ca6k_00266) directly addresses StorageShape vs Shape confusion in TilingFunc/InferShape, matching the exact error pattern. Memory cd8066f0 (argmax_over_a_dimension) similarly covers StorageShape* errors in TilingFunc. Memory ddf7fbd3 (masked_cumsum) covers the same shape conversion issue. Memory 7340946f (tall_skinny_matrix_multiplication) deals with shape conversion in opbuild context, though in InferShape, it still informs proper API usage. Memory 84bb2c98 (ca6k_00188) addresses tiling data assignment (direct member assignment when setter methods are missing), providing a contrast: here direct assignment fails, hinting that setter methods may be required. Together, these memories offer complementary guidance for both the shape API and tiling data access issues.
